scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @dioramai/schema && npm run build -w @dioramai/core && npm run build -w @dioramai/export-r3f && npm run build -w @dioramai/r3f-bridge && npm run build -w @dioramai/ingestion && npm run build -w @dioramai/local-bridge && npm run build -w dioramai && npm run build -w @dioramai/mcp && npm run build -w @dioramai/examples
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dioramai/schema && npm run test -w @dioramai/core && npm run test -w @dioramai/export-r3f && npm run test -w @dioramai/r3f-bridge && npm run test -w @dioramai/ingestion && npm run test -w @dioramai/local-bridge && npm run test -w @dioramai/mcp && npm run test -w web
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w web
